series_metadata.series_title: Precedent Setting Decisions involving Lower & Higher Authority Appeals, & Court Appeals
series_metadata.series_description: Decisions on all appeals of cases coming to the U.C. Review Commission. Includes decisions on cases involving any unemployment compensation appeal, further appeal, tax liability, federal program, mass or labor dispute, delinquent account, employer contribution, or from the Courts. Precedent setting decisions are a compilation of decisions which illustrate precedent in new and unusual cases and decisions which serve as examples of frequently encountered situations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: All decisions are be stored permanently per 4141.06 of ORC. It requires Secretary of UCRC keep a record of all decisions because of periodic requests from employers and other interested parties
